title: nf-core Hackathon Form Definition
description: Schema for hackathon registration form YAML files used by the nf-core Slack bot. Each YAML file defines one hackathon event with its metadata and multi-step registration form.

hackathon.description: Unique hackathon identifier slug (lowercase letters, digits, and hyphens). Used as the primary key in DynamoDB and the YAML filename.

title.description: Human-readable display title for the hackathon event, shown in Slack modals and messages.

status.description:
Current lifecycle status of the hackathon. Only one hackathon should be 'open' at a time.

- draft: form is being prepared, not visible to users
- open: registration is active and accepting submissions
- closed: registration has ended, data is still accessible
- archived: hackathon is fully complete and archived

channel.description: Slack channel for the hackathon — either a full Slack archive URL or a raw channel ID (starting with C).

url.description: Public URL with more information about the hackathon event (typically an nf-co.re event page).

date_start.description: Start date of the hackathon in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD).

date_end.description: End date of the hackathon in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD).

steps.description: Ordered list of registration form steps. Each step becomes a separate Slack modal view. Steps can be statements (informational text) or forms (with input fields).

step.description: A single step in the multi-step registration form. Either a statement (text only) or a form (with input fields).

statementStep.description: An informational step that displays text to the user without collecting any input.

id.description: Unique identifier for this step, used for internal tracking and condition references.

title.description: Title displayed at the top of the Slack modal for this step.

type.description: Step type — must be 'statement' for informational text steps.

text.description: Markdown-formatted text displayed to the user. Supports Slack mrkdwn syntax.

formStep.description: A form step that collects user input through one or more fields.

id.description: Unique identifier for this step, used for internal tracking and condition references.

title.description: Title displayed at the top of the Slack modal for this step.

fields.description: Ordered list of input fields displayed in this form step.

condition.description: Optional condition that controls whether this step is shown. The step is displayed only when the user's answer to the referenced field matches the expected value.

field.description: The field ID from a previous step whose answer is checked.

equals.description: The expected value that the referenced field must match for this step to be shown.

field.description: A single input field within a form step. The available properties depend on the field type.

id.description: Unique identifier for this field, used as the key when storing the user's answer.

type.description:
The input type for this field.

- text: single or multi-line text input
- static_select: dropdown menu with predefined options
- checkboxes: one or more checkboxes the user can toggle

label.description: Label text displayed above the input field in the Slack modal.

required.description: Whether this field must be filled in before the user can proceed. Defaults to false.

multiline.description: If true, renders a multi-line textarea instead of a single-line text input. Only valid for type 'text'.

options.description: Inline list of options for this dropdown. Use this OR options_from, not both.

options_from.description:
Dynamic option source. Options are populated at runtime from the specified data source.

- sites: hackathon local sites from DynamoDB
- countries: ISO 3166-1 country list

options.description: Inline list of options for these checkboxes. Use this OR options_from, not both.

options_from.description:
Dynamic option source. Options are populated at runtime from the specified data source.

- sites: hackathon local sites from DynamoDB
- countries: ISO 3166-1 country list

option.description: A selectable option for static_select or checkboxes fields.

label.description: Display text shown to the user for this option.

value.description: Machine-readable value stored when this option is selected.

description.description: Optional help text displayed below the option label.
